---
pagetitle: "Lutong Wen"
---

<div class="hero-section">

<p class="hero-label">Boston University MET Portfolio</p>

<h1>Lutong Wen</h1>

<h2>Applied Business Analytics | Project Management | Cloud and Web Analytics</h2>

<p>
I am a Boston University Metropolitan College student in Applied Business Analytics with a background in project management, marketing analytics, web analytics, and cloud computing.
</p>

<p>
This portfolio highlights my academic projects, technical skills, CV, and contact information. My current career interests include business analytics, marketing analytics, cloud-based analytics, and data-driven program management.
</p>

<p>
<a class="btn btn-primary" href="projects.html">View Projects</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="cv.html">View CV</a>
</p>

</div>

## Portfolio Focus

<div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 g-4">

<div class="col">
<div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
<div class="card-body">
<h3 class="card-title">Business Analytics</h3>
<p class="card-text">Using data to support business decisions, identify patterns, and communicate practical insights.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col">
<div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
<div class="card-body">
<h3 class="card-title">Marketing and Web Analytics</h3>
<p class="card-text">Analyzing customer behavior, campaign performance, A/B testing results, and digital engagement.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col">
<div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
<div class="card-body">
<h3 class="card-title">Project Management</h3>
<p class="card-text">Connecting analytics work with planning, stakeholder communication, risk management, and business value.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col">
<div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
<div class="card-body">
<h3 class="card-title">Cloud Foundations</h3>
<p class="card-text">Building familiarity with AWS services, deployment basics, and cloud-based technical workflows.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

## Featured Skills

<p>
<span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-primary">Python</span>
<span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-primary">SQL</span>
<span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-primary">Tableau</span>
<span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-primary">GitHub</span>
<span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-primary">Quarto</span>
<span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-primary">AWS</span>
<span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-primary">Marketing Analytics</span>
<span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-primary">Project Management</span>
</p>
